title: Growth and decrease (Klee #15) — redo as a breathing flow field

rule.concept: Wachsen und Abnehmen (growth and decrease): a breathing progression that swells then shrinks.

restrictions: REDO of round 28 (a comma/mark field), rejected 'not worthy'. Lesson: mark/stroke fields are out; the reliable winner is the flowing STREAMLINE CURRENT field (R25/R27). So growth-and-decrease is rendered as a BREATHING flow field on the winning `flowWhirls` engine: full-field swirling streamline currents whose length & density swell to a crest band then thin/shorten toward the edges — the concept modulates the winning look. Strong organic swirl retained (R27 winner). Monochrome; open enough to read (not mud), substantial at the crest (not sparse). The 16 span the breathe axis (vertical/horizontal/diagonal), crest position (mid/low/high) & breadth (narrow/broad), swirl strength & vortex count, and line length.
